title: nabalu corneri
intro: Nabalu corneri, also known as the "Mountain Crab Apple," is a rare and endangered species of plant native to the Eastern Himalayas. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Nabalu corneri include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
